=============== ANALISE DO BREAKING POINT (/checkout/crypto) ===============
Latencia estoura SLA (p95>=500ms): ~25 VUs (janela 0-15s | erro 0.0% | p95 3282ms)
Comeca a FALHAR (erro>=1%)        : ~74 VUs (janela 30-45s | erro 12.6% | p95 9526ms)
